question: List all Symphonies composed by Louise Farrenc.
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?symphony WHERE { ?symphony a <http://data.doremus.org/expression/1cd199bf-42d8-33ad-a331-518d2a284e77> . <http://data.doremus.org/artist/1d78b116-b274-3a8f-88dd-a32e77f30ee9> ecrm:P128_is_subject_of ?symphony . }
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.27s
